name: Zurn Elkay Water Solutions Corporation
description: Zurn Elkay Water Solutions Corporation is a leading provider of sustainable water solutions, headquartered in Milwaukee, Wisconsin. The company specializes in products and systems designed to enhance water quality, safety, hygiene, flow control, and conservation. With a diverse portfolio of brands, including Zurn, Elkay, Wilkins, and World Dryer, the company serves commercial, municipal, healthcare, and industrial markets. Zurn Elkay is committed to delivering high-performance, reliable products that reduce environmental impact and provide long-term value, helping customers manage water usage efficiently in and around buildings across the globe.
